---
title: "Open Source Projects"
pagetitle: "Projects | Anthony Faustine"
description-meta: "Open-source ML libraries for forecasting, load monitoring, and production machine learning systems."

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    body-class: "projects-page"

toc: false
---

<div class="projects-header">

## Open Source Projects

Production-grade ML libraries from research to enterprise

</div>

<div class="projects-timeline">

```{r projects-timeline, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
library(yaml)
library(htmltools)

projects_data <- yaml::read_yaml("data.yml")

html_content <- ""

for (proj in projects_data$projects) {
  status_class <- tolower(proj$status)
  icon <- switch(proj$status,
    "Active" = "rocket",
    "Maintained" = "gear",
    "Community" = "people",
    "star"
  )

  status_label <- switch(proj$status,
    "Active" = "🚀 Active",
    "Maintained" = "⚙️ Maintained",
    "Community" = "👥 Community",
    "Active"
  )

  links_html <- ""
  for (link in proj$links) {
    links_html <- paste0(links_html,
      sprintf('<a href="%s" class="timeline-link" title="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-%s"></i>%s</a>\n',
              link$url, link$label, link$icon, link$label))
  }

  if (!is.null(proj$paper)) {
    links_html <- paste0(links_html,
      sprintf('<a href="%s" class="timeline-link" title="View Paper" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-file-pdf"></i>Paper</a>\n',
              proj$paper$url))
  }

  event_html <- sprintf(
    '<div class="timeline-event status-%s">
      <div class="timeline-icon"><i class="bi bi-%s"></i></div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <div class="timeline-year">%d</div>
        <h3 class="timeline-title">%s</h3>
        <div class="timeline-meta">
          <span class="timeline-status">%s</span>
          <span>Updated: %s</span>
        </div>
        <p class="timeline-description">%s</p>
        <div class="timeline-links">
          %s
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>',
    status_class,
    icon,
    proj$year,
    proj$name,
    status_label,
    proj$updated,
    proj$description,
    links_html
  )

  html_content <- paste0(html_content, event_html, "\n")
}

HTML(html_content)
```

</div>

---

## Contributing

These projects welcome contributions and collaboration.

[Open an Issue](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm} [Submit a PR](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
